title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core (read, write, edit, bash) and extensible architecture. It supports multiple open-source and frontier models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering an alternative to expensive proprietary agent harnesses with rate-limiting constraints.
